zh.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith是John ap Grond和Gwirvil ap Philip的女兒，於1425年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬。她於大約1443年與Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1514年在威爾士格拉莫爾根牛頓享年89歲，埋葬在威爾士卡馬特史爾卡馬特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith是John ap Grond和Gwirvil ap Philip的女儿，于1425年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬。她于大约1443年与Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1514年在威尔士格拉莫爾根牛頓享年89岁，埋葬在威尔士卡馬特史爾卡馬特。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Welsh: traditional spelling of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griffieth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .
German: variant of   Greif   1.

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire):
habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).
possibly a variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffes
meanings: Welsh: altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffeth
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

variants.name: Griffth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffitt
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

nameMeanings.name: Elsbeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern variant of   Elspeth .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith was born in 1425, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France as the daughter of John ap Grond and Gwirvil ap Philip. She married Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff about 1443, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1514, in Newton, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 89, and was buried in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith est née en 1425, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, fille de John ap Grond et Gwirvil ap Philip. Elle a épousé Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff environ 1443, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1514, à Newton, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith wurde 1425 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich, als Tochter von John ap Grond und Gwirvil ap Philip geboren. Sie hat um 1443 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1514 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Newton, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith è nata il nel 1425 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia come figlia di John ap Grond e Gwirvil ap Philip. Lei sposato Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff circa 1443, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1514, nel Newton, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffithは1425年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンでJohn ap GrondとGwirvil ap Philipの娘として生まれた。約1443年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでThomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1514年にウェールズグラモーガンニュートンで89歳で死去し，ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカーマースンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith(은)는 1425년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 John ap Grond(와)과 Gwirvil ap Philip의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1443년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 웨일스 글램르건 뉴턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카마테실르 카마테에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith nasceu em 1425, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França filha de John ap Grond e Gwirvil ap Philip. Ela casou-se com Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff aproximadamente 1443, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1514, em Newton, Glamorgan, Gales, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith родилась в 1425 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. Её родителей звали John ap Grond и Gwirvil ap Philip. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff около 1443 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1514 г. в местности нютон, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith nació en 1425, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia como hija de John ap Grond y Gwirvil ap Philip. Se casó con Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff aproximadamente 1443, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1514, en Newton, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales.
